name: context-menu
description: A right-click context menu opened at the pointer (WAI-ARIA APG menu pattern, matched to Radix ContextMenu); submenus, checkbox/radio items, separators; positioned by @floating-ui/dom with flip + shift.
docs: Register <lv-context-menu> by importing components/ui/context-menu.ts from your entry point. Put the right-clickable region in the default slot; pass `items` as an array of { key, label, icon?, shortcut?, disabled?, type?: 'item'|'checkbox'|'radio'|'separator'|'submenu', checked?, radioGroup?, children? }. Listen for `lv-select` (detail = activated item key) and `lv-checked-change` (detail = { key, checked }) for checkbox/radio toggles.
